forecast-period.text: Clear. Light winds.

Sunny. The chance of fog about the southern Fleurieu Peninsula in the early morning. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning then tending north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:40am to 2:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon then tending east to southeasterly in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Sunny. The chance of morning fog on the eastern slopes. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day then tending north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Mostly sunny. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Clear. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Mostly sunny. The chance of fog in the south in the early morning. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
High
Sun protection 9:50am to 2:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h shifting south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 18 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h shifting northerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Mostly sunny. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Clear. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h.

The chance of fog in the early morning. Sunny day. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 2:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the early morning. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h shifting southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the late morning and early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Sunny. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.
Clear. Light winds.

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then tending northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 2:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h shifting south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.
Mostly sunny. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.
Clear. Light winds.

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 2:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then tending southeast to southwesterly in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Clear. Light winds.

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then tending northeasterly in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 30s.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:40am to 2:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]
Mostly sunny. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Sunny. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending northeasterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.
Clear. Light winds.

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then tending northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:50am to 2:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly in the early afternoon then tending southeast to southwesterly in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

The chance of morning fog. Sunny day. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.
Mostly sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.
Clear. Light winds.

Mostly sunny. The chance of fog in the south in the early morning. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then tending north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:50am to 2:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Mostly sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching 25 to 30.
Clear. Light winds.

Mostly sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching 25 to 31.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:40am to 2:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the middle of the day then becoming northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Sunny. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching 25 to 30.

Mostly sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching 24 to 29.
Clear. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower west of Nullarbor in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm west of Nullarbor in the evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northerly 35 to 50 km/h before dawn. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 30s.
High
Sun protection 10:00am to 3:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Mostly sunny. Winds south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching 25 to 31.

Sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 30s.
Partly cloudy. Winds northerly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 16 and 20 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Clear. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h.

The chance of fog in the early morning. Mostly sunny day. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northerly 25 to 35 km/h before dawn. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 30s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:50am to 2:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h shifting south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late morning and afternoon then tending northeast to southeasterly in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Sunny. Light winds becoming northerly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 30s.
Mostly sunny. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Clear. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Mostly sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning north to northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h during the morning then becoming northerly 15 to 25 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 30s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 2:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Slight chance of a shower in the early morning. Sunny afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h shifting south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h before dawn then tending east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwest to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 30s.
Partly cloudy. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Clear. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h.
Mostly sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 21 with daytime temperatures reaching 30 to 35.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:40am to 3:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 30s.
Sunny. Winds northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching 30 to 35.
Mostly sunny. Winds northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Clear. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Winds east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending east to northeasterly in the middle of the day then tending east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:30am to 3:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]
Sunny. Winds easterly 15 to 25 km/h turning southeasterly in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching 27 to 32.
Sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending east to northeasterly during the morning then tending east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
